query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
(750012, 'What are the Gospels described as?', 'multiple_choice', '["Pure biography","Theological biographies presenting Jesus as Messiah","Fiction","Poetry"]', 'Theological biographies presenting Jesus as Messiah', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What is the synoptic problem?', 'multiple_choice', '["Contradictions in the Gospels","The literary relationship between Matthew, Mark, and Luke","Translation issues","Manuscript problems"]', 'The literary relationship between Matthew, Mark, and Luke', 2, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What is redaction criticism?', 'multiple_choice', '["Editing manuscripts","Studying how each Gospel writer shaped material for theological purposes","Correcting errors","Comparing translations"]', 'Studying how each Gospel writer shaped material for theological purposes', 3, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What are the epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["Historical narratives","Occasional letters addressing specific situations","Poetry collections","Prophetic visions"]', 'Occasional letters addressing specific situations', 4, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What does "occasional" mean regarding the epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["Written occasionally","Written for specific occasions and situations","Written randomly","Written for entertainment"]', 'Written for specific occasions and situations', 5, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'According to John 20:31, why was John''s Gospel written?', 'multiple_choice', '["For entertainment","That you may believe Jesus is the Christ","As historical record only","To replace other Gospels"]', 'That you may believe Jesus is the Christ', 6, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What must we understand about epistles to interpret them correctly?', 'multiple_choice', '["Only the theology","The historical situation they addressed","Only the grammar","Only the author"]', 'The historical situation they addressed', 7, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What is the interpretive principle for parables?', 'multiple_choice', '["Find meaning in every detail","Focus on the main point","Allegorize everything","Ignore context"]', 'Focus on the main point', 8, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'According to 2 Timothy 3:16-17, what is Scripture useful for?', 'multiple_choice', '["Entertainment only","Teaching, reproof, correction, and training in righteousness","Historical record only","Debate"]', 'Teaching, reproof, correction, and training in righteousness', 9, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'What is the relationship between indicative and imperative in the epistles?', 'multiple_choice', '["No relationship","What God has done (indicative) grounds what we should do (imperative)","Imperative comes first","They are unrelated"]', 'What God has done (indicative) grounds what we should do (imperative)', 10, NOW(), NOW()),
(750012, 'Explain how understanding the occasional nature of the epistles affects how we apply them today.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Student response required', 11, NOW(), NOW());
